name: font_size_larger_forward

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] 文字サイズ変更 forward-reference ［＃「X」はN段階大きな文字］ (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html) enlarges a run by N stages. Per §7.5 it consumes the preceding target literal 甲 and yields an emphasis node; §8 renders <span class="aozora-font-larger" data-steps="N">. Full-width magnitudes parse but canonicalise to ASCII on serialize (§7.6 idempotent), so this vector uses an ASCII digit for a byte-exact round-trip. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor. New family.

source: 甲［＃「甲」は2段階大きな文字］

expected.serialize: 甲［＃「甲」は2段階大きな文字］
